---
title: "Weekly Dean Report"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
params:
  dean_id: ""
  week_id: ""
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 7, fig.height = 4)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

ANALYTICS_HOME <- Sys.getenv("ANALYTICS_HOME", ".")
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "config.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "scripts", "utils.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "analysis", "weekly_dean_analysis.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "scripts", "fetch_data.R"))

dean_id <- params$dean_id
week_id <- params$week_id
stats   <- weekly_dean_analysis(dean_id, week_id)
wp      <- fetch_weekly_period(week_id)
```

---

**Week:** `r wp$week_number` / `r wp$year` (`r wp$start_date` – `r wp$end_date`)

---

## 1. Department Overview

```{r overview}
knitr::kable(data.frame(
  Metric = c("Total Sessions", "Lecturers Active", "Courses Active",
             "Dept Avg Engagement"),
  Value  = c(stats$n_sessions, stats$n_lecturers, stats$n_courses,
             ifelse(is.na(stats$avg_engagement), "N/A",
                    sprintf("%.2f", stats$avg_engagement)))
), col.names = c("Metric","Value"))
```

## 2. Course Rankings

```{r course-rank}
if (!is.null(stats$course_summary) && nrow(stats$course_summary) > 0) {
  cs <- stats$course_summary %>% arrange(desc(avg_eng))
  ggplot(cs, aes(x = reorder(code, avg_eng), y = avg_eng, fill = avg_eng)) +
    geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_gradient(low = "#EF5350", high = "#66BB6A") +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), labels = scales::percent) +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(x = "Course", y = "Avg Engagement",
         title = "Course Engagement Rankings") +
    theme_minimal()
} else {
  cat("No course data available.")
}
```

## 3. Lecturer Performance

```{r lecturer-perf}
if (!is.null(stats$lecturer_ranking) && nrow(stats$lecturer_ranking) > 0) {
  lr <- stats$lecturer_ranking
  ggplot(lr, aes(x = reorder(lecturer_name, avg_eng), y = avg_eng)) +
    geom_col(fill = "#42A5F5") +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), labels = scales::percent) +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(x = "Lecturer", y = "Avg Engagement",
         title = "Lecturer Engagement Comparison") +
    theme_minimal()
} else {
  cat("No lecturer data available.")
}
```

## 4. At-Risk Courses

```{r at-risk}
if (!is.null(stats$at_risk_courses) && nrow(stats$at_risk_courses) > 0) {
  knitr::kable(
    stats$at_risk_courses[, c("code","course_title","avg_eng")],
    col.names = c("Code","Title","Avg Engagement"),
    digits = 3
  )
} else {
  cat("No at-risk courses this week.")
}
```

## 5. Weekly Trends

```{r weekly-trends}
hist_data <- with_connection(function(con) {
  dbGetQuery(con,
    "SELECT wp.week_number, wp.year,
            AVG(es.engagement_score) AS avg_eng
       FROM emotion_snapshots es
       JOIN lecture_sessions ls ON ls.id = es.session_id
       JOIN weekly_periods wp ON es.captured_at BETWEEN wp.start_date
            AND DATE_ADD(wp.end_date, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
      GROUP BY wp.id, wp.week_number, wp.year
      ORDER BY wp.year, wp.week_number
      LIMIT 12")
})
if (nrow(hist_data) >= 2) {
  ggplot(hist_data, aes(x = week_number, y = avg_eng, group = year,
                        colour = factor(year))) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), labels = scales::percent) +
    labs(x = "Week", y = "Avg Engagement", colour = "Year",
         title = "Department Engagement Trend") +
    theme_minimal()
} else {
  cat("Insufficient historical data for trend chart.")
}
```
